description: Composition Red and black round neck jersey made of 100% polyester, has short raglan sleeves with contrast mesh panelling and branding on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water not more than 40 degrees Use mild detergent Do not bleach, wring Flat dry in shade For the flamboyant sport fan, this jersey from kipsta is a must-have with its bright hue and narrow flattering silhouette. Pair it with washed jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'2" and shoulders 18"
